title: Lifting Engineer
description:
Lifting Engineer (Singapore MRT Projects)

Professional Summary

Lifting Engineer with a strong construction and rail infrastructure background, experienced in delivering Singapore MRT projects in compliance with LTA, MOM, and WSH regulations. Proven capability in planning and executing complex lifting operations in dense urban environments, including underground stations, viaducts, and depot works, with a strong focus on safety, constructability, and interface management.

Key Responsibilities

  • Prepare Lifting Plans, Lift Studies, and Method Statements in accordance with LTA specifications, MOM/WSH requirements, and project safety standards

  • Engineer lifting operations for precast segments, U-girders, pier heads, station structural elements, E&M and rail systems equipment

  • Perform detailed lifting calculations, including load verification, center of gravity, sling forces, crane capacity, and utilization checks

  • Plan lifts in restricted MRT corridors, adjacent to live traffic, existing buildings, utilities, and operational rail lines

  • Support selection, positioning, and sequencing of mobile cranes, crawler cranes, and tower cranes

  • Conduct ground bearing pressure calculations, crane mat design inputs, and lifting assessments near excavations and tunnels

  • Coordinate lifting works with temporary works, civil, structural, E&M, and rail systems teams

  • Participate in interface coordination meetings with LTA, operators, and other contractors and customers.

  • Attend pre-lift briefings, safety reviews, and toolbox meetings

  • Provide on-site engineering support during critical lifts, night works, and possession periods

  • Review lifting operations involving work over or near operational MRT lines

Singapore MRT / LTA-Specific Experience

  • Underground MRT stations (cut-and-cover and mined stations)

  • TBM support works and segment handling

  • Elevated viaducts and precast U-girder / segment erection

  • Depot buildings, stabling yards, and heavy plant installation

  • Lifting works under limited headroom, noise, and time restrictions

Regulatory & Standards Knowledge

  • LTA Code of Practice and project specifications

  • MOM / WSH (Operation of Cranes, Lifting Equipment) Regulations

  • SS, BS, and EN lifting-related standards

  • Permit-to-Work and lifting approval workflows under Singapore projects

Qualifications & Certifications

  • Degree in Civil or Mechanical Engineering

  • Appointed Person (Lifting Operations) – MOM-recognized

  • LTA Safety Induction / MRT Safety Pass (project dependent)

  • Temporary Works Coordinator / Supervisor (advantage)

  • WSH / NEBOSH qualification (advantage)

postedCompany.description:
METRO RAIL ENGINEERING SERVICES PTE LTD (MRES) is an engineering services company formed from a core team of experienced installation and testing & commissioning personnel with 15 years of Singapore Power Supply System for Rail Transportation and Infrastructure development sectors.

We provide comprehensive specialist services to Railway and Infrastructure development sectors from Project Management, Design, Installation, Testing & Commissioning and Maintenance for the following sub-systems;

  • High Voltage Power Supply
  • Conductor Rail - 3rd Rail
  • OHE/ ROCS
  • Rolling Stock Maintenance

Our core competency areas are High Voltage & Medium Voltage Power Supply systems which includes 22kV AC, 33kV AC, 750V DC, Stinger Rail, Railway Safety System PLC/ SCADA and Auxiliary Equipments.

SERVICES

We provide the following Project Management services to High Voltage Power Supply, Conductor Rail - 3rd Rail, OHE/ ROCS and Rolling Stock Maintenance. From start to finish, or provide specialist support for individual phases of the project.

  • Project Management
  • Design Engineering
  • Installation
  • Testing & Commissioning
  • Preventative and Predictive Maintenance

SAFETY, SKILLS AND ACCREDITATIONS

Our personnel have a thorough understanding of Health & Safety regulation particularly those relevant to the Electricity Distribution and Construction industries.

SAFETY POLICY

Our mission is to provide a healthy, safe, clean and enjoyable working environment for our employees. The management is committed to;

  • Zero injuries
  • Zero loss time accidents
  • Providing our employees with continuous training and development to achieve excellent safety performance
  • Demonstrate model performance in our industry that all other companies measure against and seek to attain.

QUALITY POLICY

The management and personnel of MRES are committed to provide a high quality service in the area of Quality management by continuously improving client service, human resource management and company operations. The management is committed to:

  • Develop and improve the Quality Management System
  • Continually improve the effectiveness of the Quality Management System
  • The enhancement of customer satisfaction.

CERTIFICATIONS

  • Bizsafe 3
  • OHSAS 18001: 2007
  • ISO 9001: 2015
  • SS 506  Part 1  2009
